task_completion.description: Verify the Product Category 'Industrial Sensors' is created with the correct description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a SuiteCRM 'Product Categories' list or detail view showing the category name 'Industrial Sensors' and the description 'Sensors for industrial monitoring and automation'.

task_completion.description: Verify the first product 'TempSense Pro X200' is created with the correct part number, price, and cost.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a SuiteCRM 'Products' list or detail view showing the product name 'TempSense Pro X200', Part Number 'TSP-X200', Price '345.00' (or 345), and Cost '172.50' (or 172.5).

task_completion.description: Verify 'TempSense Pro X200' has the correct description and is linked to the 'Industrial Sensors' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the detail or edit view of 'TempSense Pro X200' showing the description 'High-accuracy industrial temperature sensor with digital output' and the Category field explicitly set to 'Industrial Sensors'.

task_completion.description: Verify the second product 'PressureGuard M500' is created with the correct part number, price, and cost.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a SuiteCRM 'Products' list or detail view showing the product name 'PressureGuard M500', Part Number 'PGM-500', Price '189.50' (or 189.5), and Cost '94.75'.

task_completion.description: Verify 'PressureGuard M500' has the correct description and is linked to the 'Industrial Sensors' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the detail or edit view of 'PressureGuard M500' showing the description 'Pressure monitoring sensor for pipeline and vessel applications' and the Category field explicitly set to 'Industrial Sensors'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the SuiteCRM web interface to create the products and categories.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the SuiteCRM web application in a browser, not terminal commands, API scripts, or database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the data was actually entered into the CRM system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the SuiteCRM forms being filled out or the final saved records within the SuiteCRM UI, rather than a text editor or notes app.

integrity.description: Verify the results are not faked using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The page should render normally without the browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) open, and the UI elements should match standard SuiteCRM styling.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Category Name: 'Industrial Sensors'. Product 1: Name 'TempSense Pro X200', Part Number 'TSP-X200', Price 345.00, Cost 172.50. Product 2: Name 'PressureGuard M500', Part Number 'PGM-500', Price 189.50, Cost 94.75.
